prompt: Create a dramatic vertical fantasy anime movie poster for {argument name="franchise title" default="LEGENDS OF URIA"}, with a clean white background, bold royal-purple graphic accents, and premium cinematic key art styling. The central figure is {argument name="character name" default="LORANA"}, a tall elegant dark witch shown from mid-thigh up in a heroic three-quarter pose, facing slightly right, with her face partially obscured by flowing long black hair. She has extremely long windblown hair streaming leftward across the composition, pale skin, a confident mysterious presence, and a dark sorceress design. Her outfit is a fitted black mini dress with structured gold trim, a sweetheart bustier, long black gloves, thigh-high black stockings, a heavy gold chain belt draped around the hips, and a large crimson cape lined in deep purple. She wears ornate red metallic shoulder armor with gold edging and matching red bracers. In her raised right hand, she levitates an old brown spellbook with gold corner details and an eight-pointed star emblem, surrounded by vivid blue magical flames and glowing energy. Behind her, place a diagonal purple panel on the right side with silhouettes of gothic spires and castles fading into the background, plus a faint circular magic sigil behind her hair and shoulders. Add small red flower petals drifting through the scene, thin black decorative lines, tiny diamond icons, dotted texture clusters, and angular red-and-purple motion graphics for a modern fantasy poster layout. At the top left, include the large stylized title text {argument name="series logo text" default="URIA"} in ornate serif fantasy lettering, with smaller text above reading "LEGENDS OF" and small Japanese subtitle text below reading "レジェンド オブ ウリア". Add 1 vertical Japanese tagline on the left side: "千年の時を超え、魔女が帰還する" with the single word "魔女" highlighted in red. At the top right, include 1 compass-like emblem and stacked small text reading "MAGIC DESTINY LEGEND". At the bottom center, add layered Spanish and English release typography: 1 red line reading "EL REGRESO DE LA BRUJA", 1 huge white number reading {argument name="year count text" default="1000"}, 1 smaller white word "AÑOS", and 1 massive purple character name reading {argument name="main name text" default="LORANA"}, with 1 small red katakana label "ローラーナ" beneath it. At the bottom left, include 1 release block with "ESTRENO 2026" and smaller text "SOLO EN CINES Y PLATAFORMAS", plus 3 small fantasy faction-style emblems. At the bottom right, include 1 stacked tagline block with five lines: "UNA LEYENDA", "PERDIDA.", "UN PODER", "PROHIBIDO.", "UN DESTINO", "INEVITABLE." At the very bottom center, add the line "DESTINY WILL BE WRITTEN IN BLOOD AND MAGIC." Use high-detail anime illustration, glossy shading, elegant fantasy poster composition, strong contrast, luxurious crimson, black, gold, and violet palette, with a polished theatrical coming-soon feel.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张戏剧性的竖版奇幻动漫电影海报，主题为 {argument name="franchise title" default="LEGENDS OF URIA"}，采用干净的白色背景、醒目的皇家紫图形点缀，以及高级电影级主视觉艺术风格。中心人物是 {argument name="character name" default="LORANA"}，一位身材高挑、优雅的暗黑女巫，以大腿以上的英雄式四分之三侧身姿态呈现，面部微向右侧，部分脸庞被飘逸的长黑发遮掩。她拥有极长的随风向左飘散的长发，皮肤苍白，散发着自信而神秘的气息，身着暗黑女巫装束。她的服装为修身黑色迷你裙，配有结构感十足的金色饰边、心形胸衣、黑色长手套、黑色过膝袜、腰间垂挂的厚重金链腰带，以及内衬深紫色的巨大深红色斗篷。她佩戴着镶金边的华丽红色金属肩甲和配套的红色护腕。她抬起的右手悬浮着一本带有金色边角细节和八角星徽章的古老棕色魔法书，周围环绕着生动的蓝色魔法火焰和发光能量。在她身后，右侧放置一个对角紫色面板，背景中隐约可见哥特式尖塔和城堡的剪影，发丝和肩后还有淡淡的圆形魔法阵。画面中加入飘落的红色花瓣、纤细的黑色装饰线条、微小的菱形图标、点状纹理簇，以及棱角分明的红紫色动态图形，以呈现现代奇幻海报布局。左上方包含大型风格化标题文字 {argument name="series logo text" default="URIA"}，采用华丽的衬线奇幻字体，上方有较小的文字“LEGENDS OF”，下方有日语副标题“レジェンド オブ ウリア”。在左侧添加 1 条竖排日语标语：“千年の時を超え、魔女が帰還する”，并将“魔女”二字标红。右上方包含 1 个类似罗盘的徽章，以及堆叠的小字“MAGIC DESTINY LEGEND”。底部中心添加分层的西班牙语和英语上映排版：1 行红色文字“EL REGRESO DE LA BRUJA”，1 个巨大的白色数字 {argument name="year count text" default="1000"}，1 个较小的白色单词“AÑOS”，以及 1 个巨大的紫色角色名 {argument name="main name text" default="LORANA"}，下方附带 1 个红色小号片假名标签“ローラーナ”。左下方包含 1 个上映信息块，写有“ESTRENO 2026”及较小文字“SOLO EN CINES Y PLATAFORMAS”，外加 3 个小型奇幻阵营风格徽章。右下方包含 1 个五行堆叠的标语块：“UNA LEYENDA”、“PERDIDA.”、“UN PODER”、“PROHIBIDO.”、“UN DESTINO”、“INEVITABLE.”。最底部中心添加一行文字：“DESTINY WILL BE WRITTEN IN BLOOD AND MAGIC.” 使用高细节动漫插画、光泽阴影、优雅的奇幻海报构图、强烈的对比度，以及奢华的深红、黑、金、紫配色，营造出精致的院线电影即将上映的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奇幻动漫女巫电影海报：一张电影感十足的竖版动漫海报，描绘了一位带有悬浮魔法书的暗黑女巫，专为奇幻系列电影宣传、预告海报及即将上映的营销视觉设计。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: poster layout, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
